otfStatus: generated with opentype.js from original contours
incomingRule: Place source files from other projects in font-files/incoming/<project>/<font-name>/ and run the compiler after mapping the final family name to gotofont Softy Sans or another gotofont-branded family.

legal.commercialSimilarityCheck: Rename and review every incoming font to avoid names confusingly similar to third-party commercial fonts.
